package com.example.service;

import java.util.Map;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;
import java.util.Stack;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * Dynamic metric calculation service.
 * This service can dynamically calculate metric values based on user-provided formulas and context data.
 * 
 * Security: This implementation uses a safe expression evaluator that only allows
 * mathematical operations and variable references, preventing RCE vulnerabilities.
 */
public class DynamicMetricService {

    // Maximum formula length to prevent DoS
    private static final int MAX_FORMULA_LENGTH = 1000;
    
    // Pattern to validate individual tokens
    private static final Pattern TOKEN_PATTERN = Pattern.compile(
        "[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*|[0-9]+\\.?[0-9]*|[+\\-*/%()]|>=|<=|==|!=|>|<|\\?|:|'[^']*'"
    );

    /**
     * Calculates a result based on the given formula and data context.
